features: Easy to use: Unlike the original models, which you had to force open or close, our lovely towel headband is very easy to open and close. The buckles are flexible and can easily and securely hold your hair in place in a matter of seconds. Cute hair accessories can also shape the face, making your face look smaller and cuter

Product packaging: You will receive a fluffy headband. Like flowers and white clouds, soft and lovely, unique and versatile. The thickened sponge design visually raises the top of the skull and fluffs the hair. This unique sponge head has some weight and is not easy to slip off

Material: This fabri headband is mainly made of sponge and wool fabric. Strong water absorption, using sponge lining and wool cloth cover surface, durable, soft and comfortable, strong water absorption. It can prevent your hair from getting wet when you wash your face, light weight smooth surface, comfortable to wear without pulling hair

ersatile: Women's SPA headbands are suitable for all occasions. In addition to being worn on your face, skin care and makeup, you can also wear them during yoga to absorb sweat and hold your hair in place. Skincare headbands are suitable for most people because they are very flexible and stretchy, so almost anyone can wear them. A women's skin care headband will hold your hair in place, keep it neat and prevent obstructing your view

Great gift: Skincare headbands are perfect for birthday parties, anniversaries, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's Day, New Year's, or other occasions. They are indeed a good choice as a gift for women. It makes it easier to style your hair and is very convenient
